home.title: ElaMachan
home.startSelling: Create a listing with AI assist

aiAssist.heading: AI-assisted listing draft
aiAssist.intro: Add a photo and a few keywords. We'll draft a trilingual listing you can edit before you publish.
aiAssist.photoHint: Up to 5 MiB. Large images are resized automatically.
aiAssist.photoTooLarge: That image is over the 5 MiB limit. Please choose a smaller file.
aiAssist.keywordsPlaceholder: e.g. iPhone 13 Pro, 256GB, blue, like new
aiAssist.keywordsHint: A few words about the item. Up to 2 KB.
aiAssist.keywordsRequired: Please enter at least a couple of keywords.
aiAssist.streamingHint: Text is being written live — you can edit any field once it appears.
aiAssist.categoryHint: Suggested by AI. Confirm or change it.
aiAssist.title: Title
aiAssist.draftReadyBody: Review and edit each language, then create your listing. Nothing is published automatically.
aiAssist.createListingHint: Creating a listing is a separate, signed-in step. The AI draft is only a starting point.
aiAssist.createListingNotWired: Listing creation is handled by the create-listing flow (not part of this draft step).
aiAssist.error: Something went wrong while drafting. Please try again.
